creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-06-04 20:07:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/py-bcfg2    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Bcfg2 helps system administrators produce a consistent, reproducible, and
  verifiable description of their environment, and offers visualization and
  reporting tools to aid in day-to-day administrative tasks.
  
  WWW:    http://www.bcfg2.org
  
  PR:             ports/113225
  Submitted by:   Robert Gogolok <gogo at cs.uni-sb.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.918     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/sysutils/py-bcfg2/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/py-bcfg2/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/py-bcfg2/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +489 -0    ports/sysutils/py-bcfg2/pkg-plist (new)
